TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: George Blaney nalecuhan i Jersey City, New Jersey, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. George Blaney i 1961 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 4 ku uwac atu silsil 33, namapili' tu nu New York Knicks putiput. tatama, nalecuhan i11 a bulad 12 a demiad, 1939 a mihcan, George Blaney, miunduay.
S.PHON: g…ôorg…ô br~…æan…ô nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i *…ôrs…ô ¶itj, n…ôw *…ôrs…ô, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. g…ôorg…ô br~…æan…ô i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu n…ôw jork kni ¶ks putiput. tatama, nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i** a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶an, g…ôorg…ô br~…æan…ô, miunduaj.
S.FORM: George Blaney nalecuhan i Jersey City, New Jersey, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. George Blaney i 1961 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 4 ku uwac atu silsil 33, namapili' tu nu New York Knicks putiput. tatama, nalecuhan i11 a bulad 12 a demiad, 1939 a mihcan, George Blaney, miunduay.
